servicesPage.metaDescription: Websites, custom systems and process improvement for small and medium businesses — with fixed-price quotes.
servicesPage.title: Services
servicesPage.intro: We don't sell packages — we build solutions. Every project starts with a consultation and continues with a fixed-price proposal.

websites.title: Websites
websites.description: Business websites that do more than look good: they load fast on mobile, speak to your customers in multiple languages, and are easy to extend. The goal is a website that works for you — building trust and bringing in enquiries.

systems.title: Custom systems
systems.description: When your business has outgrown spreadsheets and paper, we build a custom system — fitted exactly to your processes. No more, no less.
systems.item4: From Excel sheet to web application

process.title: Process improvement
process.description: As your business grows, we help your internal operations keep pace — based on Lean Six Sigma methodology.
process.item2: Power BI dashboards for real-time overview

pricing.title: About pricing
pricing.description: We don't publish a price list because every project is different. Our quotes, however, are always fixed-price — write to us and you'll get exact numbers.

referencesPage.metaDescription: Real, completed projects: online food ordering system, business websites, worker time-tracking software, manufacturing process improvement.
referencesPage.title: References
referencesPage.intro: Every project here is real, completed work. Client names are shared on request, with their permission.

cta.title: Facing a similar challenge?
cta.description: Tell us what you're struggling with — we'll tell you honestly whether we can help.

restaurant.title: Online food ordering system
restaurant.oneliner: A branded online ordering interface instead of phone orders — with no platform commission.
restaurant.problem: The restaurant's orders came in by phone and messages — at peak times this led to mistakes and missed orders, while the big food-delivery platforms' commissions would have eaten the margin.
restaurant.solution: A dedicated online ordering interface: menu management, order intake and a kitchen overview — under the restaurant's own brand, commission-free.
restaurant.result: Orders now arrive in one place, accurately and traceably; staff can focus on guests instead of the phone.

websites.title: Business websites
websites.oneliner: Presentation sites their owners are proud to put on business cards and ads.
websites.problem: Several small businesses were operating with outdated websites or no online presence at all — prospects couldn't find them, or didn't get a trustworthy first impression.
websites.solution: Modern, mobile-friendly presentation sites: clear structure, fast loading, easy maintenance — multilingual where needed.
websites.result: A professional online presence that builds trust and that the owners confidently point their customers to.

timetracking.title: Worker time-tracking software
timetracking.oneliner: Accurate, searchable working-time data instead of paper records.
timetracking.problem: Working hours were tracked on paper and in spreadsheets — the end-of-month summary was slow and full of room for error.
timetracking.solution: Simple time-tracking software: workers log their hours, management sees summaries instantly and can export them for payroll.
timetracking.result: End-of-month admin now takes a fraction of the time, and the data is accurate and searchable at any moment.

manufacturing.title: Process improvement in a pool manufacturing plant
manufacturing.oneliner: Mapped production processes: clear dependencies, measured lost time, a smarter plant layout.
manufacturing.problem: Production had grown organically over the years with no documented processes — it wasn't clear which step depended on what, where time was being lost, or why the plant was arranged the way it was.
manufacturing.solution: We walked and mapped the entire production process: a process map, a breakdown of dependencies between steps and of lost time, plus concrete recommendations for the plant layout.
manufacturing.result: Management now sees in black and white where time is lost and what depends on what — improvement decisions can be based on facts instead of gut feeling.

aboutPage.metaDescription: Pragma is a small, independent consultancy from the Hungarian–Slovak border region. Practical. Precise. Pragma.
aboutPage.title: About
aboutPage.p1: Pragma is a Greek word: it means deed, action. That's no accident — we believe a good solution is measured in working tools, not presentations.
aboutPage.p2: Pragma is a small, independent consultancy from the Hungarian–Slovak border region. We work with small and medium businesses and family companies — in three languages: Hungarian, Slovak and English.
aboutPage.p3: Our goal is simple: we want the businesses of our region to move forward. Where paper, notebooks and scattered spreadsheets run the day-to-day today, tomorrow there should be digital tools that genuinely fit the company — not the other way around.
aboutPage.p4: We do this pragmatically: no unnecessary jargon, fixed prices, and you always talk directly with the person actually doing the work.
